text: Hey CS, has there ever been a challenge or problem with changing your YTP technique/style over the past decade or so? Like do you ever think of changing it up a bit or sticking to the same approach/humor?
author: @ariverbythesea

text: I've been trying to implement more warpy-style effects, but it poses a challenge since I use Premiere as my primary software (with no plugins, mind you).  YTPers who use Sony Vegas are way more capable of doing hilarious warpy visuals and warpy audio, and I'm sorta envious of that.
